generation_rules: Use Page Object Model pattern with a dedicated class per page
Define locators in the constructor using Playwright locator methods (getByRole, getByTestId, getByLabel)
Prefer data-testid attributes over CSS selectors or XPath
Keep test specs focused on user workflows, not implementation details
Use beforeEach for common setup; avoid beforeAll for shared mutable state
All Playwright actions must be async/await
Export the page object class as a named export
Return the full generated content inside a JSON artifact block
description: Playwright TypeScript POM: generates page objects and test specs using Page Object Model with Playwright locators
